calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-03-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Elliott Myles, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Samuel Harrison appears in pro per. Respondent, George Zea does not appear. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

Parties have come to a settlement, appeal to be dismissed once document is filed with the request for such.

9:12am

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Apr-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 414

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-15-2010 Judgment Entered
